nasb.text: Moreover, we have not listened to Your servants the prophets, who spoke in Your name to our kings, our princes, our fathers and all the people of the land.

esv.text: We have not listened to your servants the prophets, who spoke in your name to our kings, our princes, and our fathers, and to all the people of the land.

cnv.text: 沒有聽從你的僕人眾先知，他們奉你的名向我們的君王、領袖、列祖和國中所有的人民說話。

ccb.text: 没有听从你的仆人——众先知奉你的名向我们的君王、首领、先祖及国中百姓所说的话。
